channel.title: Discover South Lake Union Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Discover South Lake Union Events

item.title: Trivia Nights at King Leroy
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: King Leroy, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Gather your crew. Flex those brain muscles. Let the games begin!

Event details

item.title: Spring Floral Workshop
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Come join Little Joy Fleurs for a night of creativity and play as we enter the beauty of spring!

Event details

item.title: History Café: Preserving the Vision of Asahel Curtis
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join Margaret Weatherbee, Head of Collections at the Washington State Historical Society and History Museum, for an in-depth look at the...

Event details

item.title: Guest Chef Night: Chef Melissa Miranda
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: FareStart Restaurant, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Please join us as we welcome Chef Melissa Miranda of Musang and Kilig for a special evening as we celebrate our students, build community and...

Event details

item.title: Pom Pom Keychain Class
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join us at Studio Form for a creative evening with Michelle of blaksands and Katie of Playdate Vintage.

Event details

item.title: Drink & Draw: FLOWER POWER
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Gage Academy of Art, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join Gage for a *FLOWER POWER* themed Drink & Draw in April!

Event details

item.title: PORTALS: Plant Wisdom & Practice
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

An immersive plant ritual with tea, movement, sound and deep listening — ground your nervous system and root into nature’s wisdom.

Event details

item.title: Stir Up the Paint: "Spring Sail"
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 12 PM

item.title: Meet the Cossacks: Seattle’s Motorcycle Stunt & Drill Team
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Dive into the history of the Cossacks, Seattle’s long strolling Motorcycle Stunt and Drill Team, with Rob Root and other members.

Event details

item.title: Science Fiction and Fantasy Short Film Festival
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 2:30 PM

Location: SIFF Cinema Uptown, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Beam yourself into bold new worlds at the Science Fiction and Fantasy Short Film Festival.

item.title: E-Recycling Event
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

We’re bringing the e-recycling bin up to the Market Hall from 11am-2:30pm. Grab any old electronics, and we’ll take care of the rest!

Event details

item.title: Paving the Way: Bicycle Infrastructure Tour
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 5:30 PM

item.title: 2026 Soundtrack for the Future Gala
item.description:
Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: The Triple Door, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Terpsichore's Landing 2026
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Alhadeff Studio Theatre, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Terpsichore’s Landing is a student-produced, choreographed, and performed show.

item.title: Glazer’s Gear Exchange
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Lake Union Piers & Pours
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Multiple Locations, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Wooden Boat Storytime
item.description:
Sunday, April 26, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: The Center for Wooden Boats, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.description:
Sunday, April 26, 2026 at 12 PM

item.title: "The Color of Light" Opening Reception
item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Winston Wächter Fine Art, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Winston Wächter Fine Art is pleased to present Seattle glass artist Ann Gardner’s new solo exhibition, The Color of Light.

Event details

item.title: "the small things" Opening Reception
item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Winston Wächter Fine Art, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Winston Wächter is pleased to present the small things, an intimate exhibition of new paintings by London-based artist Claire Partington.

Event details

item.description:
Sunday, May 10, 2026 at 10 AM

item.title: History Café: Field Notes Podcast
item.description:
Wednesday, May 20, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Bloom in Sound
item.description:
Thursday, May 21, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Studio Forma, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

A beautiful orchestra of sounds that will allow you to go deep into a meditative journey to find home within yourself.

Event details

item.title: Photography Fundamentals with John Greengo
item.description:
Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 9:30 AM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

The fundamentals of photography are the most important ideas and concepts you will need for success in your photographic journey.

Event details

item.title: Glazer's Video Fundamentals - Part 2
item.description:
Sunday, May 24, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Building on the concepts taught in Video Fundamentals Part 1, this class will round out your skill set and give you confidence in your abilities.

Event details
